last_completed_round.direction_name: Deepen The Active PTX Hot-Band To A 3-Stage Pg2s Pipeline
last_completed_round.hypothesis: After restoring launch_bounds to 2, the PTX anchor regained low barrier and low short-scoreboard, but the remaining gap is now long_scoreboard plus mio_throttle at only 16.60% active warps. A 3-stage Pg2s ring should hide more global-to-shared latency by keeping one extra refill in flight, so the kernel can recover tensor activity without needing the failed register-interleave rewrite.

notes: Completed round 4/20. Continue with node_b for round 5/20. Accepted base: 20260421_172601_bf16_gemm_v1_117cd3e7 at 24.806945 ms.
